title: US Outlines Its $5 Billion Genesis Mission To Boost Science With AI
excerpt: Several federal agencies are contributing toward the interdisciplinary research efforts.
content_html:
Several federal agencies are contributing toward the interdisciplinary research efforts.

Orhan Cam/Shutterstock

Today, the White House and the Department of Energy shared some details about the types of research the Genesis Mission will undertake. The Genesis Mission was created via executive order last November with the broadly stated goal of using AI to further scientific discoveries. The Department of Energy was named as a main leader of the endeavor, but at least 15 federal agencies are now involved, including Department of Health and Human Services, the National Institutes of Health, the Department of Transportation, the Department of the Interior, NASA, the National Science Foundation, the Department of War, the Department of Agriculture and the Department of Commerce. More than $5 billion has been committed to the Genesis Mission across those departments.

Participants will work toward accomplishing National Science and Technology Challenges, making contributions in the form of research awards, funding opportunities, specialized scientific datasets and research facilities. The challenges cover topics in health care like "finding the root causes of chronic disease," energy infrastructure like "scaling the grid to power the American economy," and national defense like "early detection and attribution of biological threats." There is also a set of challenges toward improving the US industries for microelectronics, biology and weapons. Finally, there's general category of "discovery" challenges that cover areas such as space and astronomy, autonomous laboratories, quantum computing, materials creation and modeling living systems.

There will also be corporate partners. Microsoft has created a program office called Scientific Partnership Advancing Research & Knowledge, or SPARK, for coordinating the research efforts. It's also backing the Genesis Mission in the form of cloud computing and AI credits.

sentences.zh: 一些联邦机构正在为跨学科研究工作做出贡献。

The Genesis Mission was created via executive order last November with the broadly stated goal of using AI to further scientific discoveries. The Department of Energy was named as a main leader of the endeavor, but at least 15 federal agencies are now involved, including Department of Health and Human Services, the National Institutes of Health, the Department of Transportation, the Department of the Interior, NASA, the National Science Foundation, the Department of War, the Department of Agriculture and the Department of Commerce. More than $5 billion has been committed to the Genesis Mission across those departments.

sentences.en: Today, the White House and the Department of Energy shared some details about the types of research the Genesis Mission will undertake.
sentences.zh: 今天，白宫和能源部分享了有关创世纪任务将进行的研究类型的一些细节。

sentences.en: The Genesis Mission was created via executive order last November with the broadly stated goal of using AI to further scientific discoveries.
sentences.zh: Genesis Mission 是去年 11 月通过行政命令创建的，其广泛目标是利用人工智能进一步推动科学发现。

sentences.en: The Department of Energy was named as a main leader of the endeavor, but at least 15 federal agencies are now involved, including Department of Health and Human Services, the National Institutes of Health, the Department of Transportation, the Department of the Interior, NASA, the National Science Foundation, the Department of War, the Department of Agriculture and the Department of Commerce.
sentences.zh: 能源部被指定为这项工作的主要领导者，但目前至少有 15 个联邦机构参与其中，包括卫生与公众服务部、美国国立卫生研究院、交通部、内政部、美国宇航局、国家科学基金会、战争部、农业部和商务部。

sentences.en: More than $5 billion has been committed to the Genesis Mission across those departments.
sentences.zh: 这些部门已向创世使命投入了超过 50 亿美元。

The challenges cover topics in health care like "finding the root causes of chronic disease," energy infrastructure like "scaling the grid to power the American economy," and national defense like "early detection and attribution of biological threats." There is also a set of challenges toward improving the US industries for microelectronics, biology and weapons. Finally, there's general category of "discovery" challenges that cover areas such as space and astronomy, autonomous laboratories, quantum computing, materials creation and modeling living systems.

sentences.en: Participants will work toward accomplishing National Science and Technology Challenges, making contributions in the form of research awards, funding opportunities, specialized scientific datasets and research facilities.
sentences.zh: 参与者将致力于完成国家科学技术挑战，以研究奖项、资助机会、专业科学数据集和研究设施的形式做出贡献。

sentences.en: The challenges cover topics in health care like "finding the root causes of chronic disease," energy infrastructure like "scaling the grid to power the American economy," and national defense like "early detection and attribution of biological threats."
sentences.zh: 这些挑战涵盖医疗保健领域的主题，例如“寻找慢性疾病的根本原因”，能源基础设施，例如“扩展电网以推动美国经济”，以及国防，例如“生物威胁的早期发现和归因”。

sentences.en: There is also a set of challenges toward improving the US industries for microelectronics, biology and weapons.
sentences.zh: 改善美国的微电子、生物和武器工业还面临一系列挑战。

sentences.en: Finally, there's general category of "discovery" challenges that cover areas such as space and astronomy, autonomous laboratories, quantum computing, materials creation and modeling living systems.
sentences.zh: 最后，还有一般类别的“发现”挑战，涵盖空间和天文学、自主实验室、量子计算、材料创造和生命系统建模等领域。

blocks.html_en: There will also be corporate partners. Microsoft has created a program office called Scientific Partnership Advancing Research & Knowledge, or SPARK, for coordinating the research efforts. It's also backing the Genesis Mission in the form of cloud computing and AI credits.

Microsoft has created a program office called Scientific Partnership Advancing Research & Knowledge, or SPARK, for coordinating the research efforts.
sentences.zh: 微软创建了一个名为科学合作伙伴推进研究与知识（SPARK）的项目办公室，用于协调研究工作。

sentences.en: It's also backing the Genesis Mission in the form of cloud computing and AI credits.
sentences.zh: 它还以云计算和人工智能积分的形式支持创世任务。

content_html_zh:
一些联邦机构正在为跨学科研究工作做出贡献。

奥尔罕凸轮/Shutterstock

今天，白宫和能源部分享了有关创世纪任务将进行的研究类型的一些细节。 Genesis Mission 是去年 11 月通过行政命令创建的，其广泛目标是利用人工智能进一步推动科学发现。 能源部被指定为这项工作的主要领导者，但目前至少有 15 个联邦机构参与其中，包括卫生与公众服务部、美国国立卫生研究院、交通部、内政部、美国宇航局、国家科学基金会、战争部、农业部和商务部。 这些部门已向创世使命投入了超过 50 亿美元。

参与者将致力于完成国家科学技术挑战，以研究奖项、资助机会、专业科学数据集和研究设施的形式做出贡献。 这些挑战涵盖医疗保健领域的主题，例如“寻找慢性疾病的根本原因”，能源基础设施，例如“扩展电网以推动美国经济”，以及国防，例如“生物威胁的早期发现和归因”。 改善美国的微电子、生物和武器工业还面临一系列挑战。 最后，还有一般类别的“发现”挑战，涵盖空间和天文学、自主实验室、量子计算、材料创造和生命系统建模等领域。

还将有企业合作伙伴。 微软创建了一个名为科学合作伙伴推进研究与知识（SPARK）的项目办公室，用于协调研究工作。 它还以云计算和人工智能积分的形式支持创世任务。
